scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pkg=require('./package.json');const errors=[];if(!fs.existsSync('memories/_index.md'))errors.push('memories/_index.md missing');if(!fs.existsSync('memories/prompt_learnings.md'))errors.push('memories/prompt_learnings.md missing');const deps={...pkg.dependencies,...pkg.devDependencies};for(const name of['next','react','react-dom','tailwindcss']){if(!deps[name])errors.push('missing dependency: '+name);}if(!fs.existsSync('next.config.ts'))errors.push('next.config.ts missing');else{const config=fs.readFileSync('next.config.ts','utf8');if(!config.includes('export default'))errors.push('next.config.ts must export default');}if(errors.length){console.error('FAIL:',errors.join('; '));process.exit(1);}console.log('PASS: infrastructure checks');" && vitest run
